spec.name: compute_sha256
spec.description: Compute the SHA-256 hash of a file's contents and return the lowercase hex digest.

path.description: Path to the file to hash.

hash.description: The lowercase SHA-256 hex digest of the file contents.

spec.implementation_notes: Read the file as raw bytes, compute SHA-256, return lowercase hex digest. Use Python: hashlib.sha256(open(path,'rb').read()).hexdigest()

request.rationale: I need to compute the SHA-256 hash of quotes.txt but none of my available tools can perform cryptographic hash computation. This is a simple, safe operation needed to satisfy the objective.
